notes:
I got the game running and played it through with just one problem. First I installed Media Foundation. https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install
The game still stalled after the logos for a while but eventually moved on. After a minute or so the intro cut scene started playing, with a bit of stuttering.
The rest of the game went fine.
The pause seems to happen at every boot of the game as well.

notes: Got the game running with no issue until now (only played around the main screen and speed through till i say a character) by using the beta version qa_v1.0.1 - which you can opt into in the properties of the game on steam.

title: I Love You, Colonel Sanders! A Finger Lickin’ Good Dating Simulator

notes: Opt into the beta, as other reports said. This allows you to skip the intro cutscene by clicking, so you can load the game. I played for about 2-3 minutes and didn't encounter any issues. Unlike other reports, though, using mf-install caused the game to crash for me. However I have not tried it on a fresh prefix with the beta
